title: Primary Window
text: Primary Window A primary window displays the form in a non-modal window that cannot be moved outside the application shell. It is defined by setting the window property Window Type to Dialog . Description When minimized, all attached secondary windows are hidden. When restored, all attached secondary windows reappear. Most editing and viewing activity in an application takes place in a primary window. If the Window Type is set to Primary , the Is Independent Form property cannot be set.
